records.ety: [F. paroxysme, Gr. <?/, fr. <?/ to sharpen, irritate; para` beside, beyond + <?/ to sharpen, from <?/ sharp.]

defs: The fit, attack, or exacerbation, of a disease that occurs at intervals, or has decided remissions or intermissions.
Any sudden and violent emotion; spasmodic passion or action; a convulsion; a fit.
quotes: The returning paroxysms of diffidence and despair.
